globalNews.title: Iran accuses US of 'reckless military adventure'
globalNews.summary: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says the US opts for a "reckless military adventure" every time a "diplomatic solution is on the table".

globalNews.title: Russia and Ukraine accuse each other of breaching Victory Day ceasefire
globalNews.summary: The two sides report responding to hundreds of drone attacks, just hours into a truce to cover celebrations of the Soviet Union's victory over Nazi Germany.

globalNews.title: Worldwide race to trace passengers from hantavirus-hit cruise ship
globalNews.summary: About 12 countries have so far been linked to the hantavirus outbreak on the MV Hondius, as the UN health agency confirms at least five cases.

globalNews.title: White House calls Mark Hamill 'sick' after actor's Trump grave post
globalNews.summary: The Star Wars actor apologised and deleted the post, which contained an AI image of the president in a shallow grave.

globalNews.title: International cyber attack disrupts swathe of universities and schools
globalNews.summary: A hacking group breached the academic software Canvas, used by thousands of schools and universities across the globe.

cryptoNews.title: Europe sees ‘hyperconcentration’ of crypto wrench attacks as losses hit $101M
cryptoNews.summary: Criminal teams behind wrench attacks usually consist of three to five people, often posing as delivery drivers or luring victims into ambushes, said CertiK.

cryptoNews.title: Australian police seize $4.1M in Bitcoin tied to darknet market
cryptoNews.summary: NSW Police said the Bitcoin was allegedly linked to illegal darknet marketplace activity involving drugs and weapons.

cryptoNews.title: How AI became crypto's favorite reason to cut staff
cryptoNews.summary: Coinbase, Block and Crypto.com have all cited AI to justify recent cuts, though Scale AI’s Jason Droege suspects companies are using the technology as cover.

cryptoNews.title: Stablecoins won’t strengthen global role of euro, ECB’s Lagarde says
cryptoNews.summary: ECB President Christine Lagarde said Europe should build tokenized settlement infrastructure anchored by central bank money rather than rely on private stablecoins.

cryptoNews.title: Revolut users report Bitcoin price glitch showing BTC at 2 cents
cryptoNews.summary: The apparent pricing error was not reflected across broader crypto markets, suggesting a platform-specific data or display issue.

aiNews.title: Last 24 hours to get 50% off a second pass to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
aiNews.summary: Last day to buy one pass and get a second one at 50% off to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026. Bring a partner, co-founder, or colleague at half off. Register now.

aiNews.title: Why you can never get your doctor to call you back
aiNews.summary: Like many AI companies automating work that humans currently do, Basata will eventually face a harder question about where the line is between augmenting workers and displacing them. For now, the foun

aiNews.title: OpenAI launches new voice intelligence features in its API
aiNews.summary: The new features could be handy for customer service systems, but OpenAI says they have applications that work across a variety of other fields, including education and creator platforms.

aiNews.title: Voi founders’ new AI startup Pit has become the latest rising star out of Stockholm
aiNews.summary: AI startup Pit is led by the co-founders of European scooter giant Voi and backed by a16z, which is leading the startup’s $16 million seed round.

aiNews.title: OpenAI introduces new ‘Trusted Contact’ safeguard for cases of possible self-harm
aiNews.summary: The company is expanding its efforts to protect ChatGPT users in cases where conversations may turn to self-harm.

economicCalendar.description: Consumer Price Index - key inflation measure
